messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
GH-24 — Coordinator activity surfaced as a compact live feed on its Telegram topic
Approval context: Your GH issue offered two shapes; this spec picks the cheaper one and needs your sign-off on three choices. (1) Mechanism: a DETERMINISTIC surfacer derives the feed from the coordinator's durable traces (outbox handoffs + bookkeeping commits) and posts lines with ZERO coordinator LLM tokens — match…
GH-24 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve GH-24" (or "reject GH-24 <reason>") to act.
